sanskrit:
तस्मात्सर्वेषु कालेषु मामनुस्मर युध्य च।
मय्यर्पितमनोबुद्धिर्मामेवैष्यस्यसंशयः॥
transliteration: tasmāt sarveṣu kāleṣu mām anusmara yudhya ca | mayy arpita-mano-buddhir mām evaiṣyasy asaṃśayaḥ ||
literal_meaning: Therefore at all times remember Me and fight; with mind and intellect offered to Me you will come to Me alone, no doubt.
contextual_meaning: Krishna prescribes a dual-track life: sustained remembrance of the sacred while fully engaging in worldly duty, integrating spiritual attention with professional action.
psychological_state: Flow-state: simultaneous absorption in task and transcendence, reducing performance anxiety through sacred anchoring.
trigger_scenario: A surgeon repeats a calming mantra while operating, keeping hands steady and mind clear under pressure.
anchor_text: Remember the sacred while doing your worldly work.
